One of the three Cappadocian Fathers. Known for his monastic rule and theological writings.

## References in Commentary

- `source.html#edge-cases-p5` — With Gregory the Theologian, devoted to Scripture for thirteen years
  text: "St. Basil and Gregory the Theologian, fleeing to the solitude of a monastery, devoted themselves for thirteen years solely to Sacred Scripture"
